text: Are all of the games included or do you have to purchase some?
text_zh: 游戏都包含在里面了吗，还是有些需要另外买？

text: Leapfrog one is cheaper, pay for additional games no sub.
text_zh: Leapfrog 的更便宜，玩别的游戏不需要订阅。

text: My kids have this on Xbox for, wait get this, free 👀
text_zh: 我的孩子们在 Xbox 上有这个，而且，你猜怎么着，是免费的 👀

text: The item itself is almost $300 then a $90 monthly subscriptions????? Wow
text_zh: 东西本身快300美元，然后每个月90美元订阅费？？？哇

text: What kind of projector do you have?
text_zh: 你用的是什么投影仪？

text: Can I buy the yearly subscription on the device? Or have to purchase a card or something? How does that work?
text_zh: 我可以在设备上购买年度订阅吗？还是需要买卡之类的？怎么操作？

text: but it's 89 bucks a year plus what I gotta pay to buy the device. it's basically like adding another bill to my life.
text_zh: 但是一年要89块，再加上买设备的钱。这简直就是给我生活里又添了一笔账。

text: Does it work with a tv or do you have to have a projector?
text_zh: 能连电视用吗，还是必须得有投影仪？

text: all of these parents complaining about the cost and subscription meanwhile have a $300+ monthly car payment and Netflix and Hulu and Disney plus and Spotify and and
text_zh: 所有这些家长都在抱怨成本和订阅，而他们自己每月付300多刀的车贷，还有Netflix、Hulu、Disney Plus、Spotify等等。

text: And we know this isn’t a security risk, how?
text_zh: 而且我们怎么知道这玩意儿没安全风险？

text: Definitely need to get this for my daughter!!
text_zh: 我女儿绝对需要这个！！

text: What do you have it hooked to to get it on the wall
text_zh: 你是怎么把它固定在墙上的

text: I fear I’d be playing this more than my kids lol!
text_zh: 我怕我会比我孩子玩得还多 lol！

text: Do the games come on it? Or do you have to pay for them?
text_zh: 游戏是自带的吗？还是需要另外付费？

text: Hi! How much light does it need? We only use a projector and were hesitant to buy this because we assumed it needed a lot of light to work? When obviously the projector needs it to be dark-ish.
text_zh: 你好！它需要多少光线？我们只用投影仪，而且一直犹豫买这个，因为我们 Assume 它需要很多光才能工作？但显然投影仪需要暗一点的环境。

text: Such a smart idea to use the projector!!!
text_zh: 用投影仪真是个绝妙的主意！！！

text: I feel like I have more space with my friends when playing Just Dance on my switch. Yeah… my kids will get the switch thank you very much.
text_zh: 我觉得我玩Switch上的《舞力全开》时，跟朋友们之间的空间感更强。嗯…我的孩子们会得到Switch的，非常感谢。

text: do you have to buy the games
text_zh: 游戏需要买吗

text: Our kids have been playing it nonstop
text_zh: 我们家的孩子们一直在玩，没停过

text: That’s pretty cool Adriel Mike like that cause it’s a game
text_zh: 挺酷的，Adriel喜欢这个，因为是游戏

text: Can’t wait for Black Friday hope it is on sale
text_zh: 等不及黑色星期五了，希望到时候能打折

text: Would love to see your set up with your next playground and projector
text_zh: 很想看看你用 Next Playground 和投影仪的设置

text: This is sooo fun!! 🤭
text_zh: 这个太好玩了！！🤭

text: Carros a control remoto
text_zh: 遥控车

text: bonsoir je peux avoir des informations je suis en France merci
text_zh: 晚上好，我能了解一些信息吗？我在法国，谢谢。

text: do not get it from tick tock it's only 60 bucks at Walmart 80 at Target
text_zh: 别在 TikTok 买，沃尔玛才60块，Target 80块

text: @Amanda Rasmussen💙 ok, I'm 100% sold now
text_zh: @Amanda Rasmussen💙 好的，我完全被说服了

text: @Delia Martinez
text_zh: @德莉娅·马丁内斯

text: @seno☾
text_zh: @seno☾

text: Are you using it with a projector ??
text_zh: 你用投影仪玩的吗？？

text: wait so 250 one time and then around 100 a year?
text_zh: 等等，所以是一次性250美元，然后一年100美元左右？

text: Aww that looks so cool for my kids but damn you have to pay for a subscription bummer!
text_zh: 哇，这看起来真适合我孩子，但是天哪，还得付费订阅，真扫兴！

text: Let me know when it’s on sale lol
text_zh: 打折的时候告诉我一声哈 lol

text: @chris.edwardo98 when she turns 3
text_zh: @chris.edwardo98 等她3岁的时候

text: @Dubble A for jaxon
text_zh: @Dubble A 给 Jaxon

text: @Jayden
text_zh: @Jayden

text: What happens if their servers ever shut down? You basically have a $300 box with no games. We almost got this if you could have the option to just buy the games you wanted instead of having to pay a nearly 100 a year subscription, not to mention you can’t even go month to month I believe the only options are 3 months or a year
text_zh: 要是他们的服务器关了怎么办？你们就剩一个 300 美元的无游戏盒子了。我们差点就买了，要是能选择单独购买游戏而不是每年付近 100 美元的订阅费，而且我记得好像也不能按月支付，只能一次性付 3 个月或一年的。

text: $100/year for basic, phone-level games you don’t own. No way to buy games, lose everything if you cancel. It’s a terrible value. Definitely not worth it. 💸🤦🏻‍♂️
text_zh: 花 100 美元一年，就玩一些基础的、手机级别的游戏，而且还不拥有。不能买游戏，退订就啥都没了。这性价比太差了。绝对不值。💸🤦🏻‍♂️

text: Don’t buy, we bought ours and it was bad out of the box.
text_zh: 别买，我们买了一个，到手就不好用。
